ddt:Target.Name: OBC_AC3_350_v3.0

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: ($29A4) - Relay control signal on phase A
($29A5) - Relay control signal on phase B
($29A6) - Relay control signal on phase N
($29E4) - DC out voltage low local failure

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.TravelledDistanceTestFailed
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.LastDisappearedMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.FisrtAppearedMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: NVFIX and NVROL error during initialization

($29B5) - CAN message for HV battery instant current
($29B6) - CAN message for HV network voltage of BMS
($29BA) - Rms value of network current on phase A
($29BC) - Rms value of network current on phase B
($29BE) - Rms value of network current on phase C
($29BF) - Rms compound voltage value on phases AB
($29C1) - Rms compound voltage value on phases BC
($29C2) - Rms compound voltage value on phases CA
($29CD) - Voltage read for relay control on phase A
($29CE) - Voltage read for relay control on phase B
($29CF) - Voltage read for relay control on phase N
($2A17)- Precharge relay c phase voltage feedback for diagnosis
($2A20) - Gain ADC voltage between phase A and phase C
($2A21) - Offset ADC voltage between phase A and phase C
($2A2C) - Gain ADC DC Bus voltage High
($2A2D) - Offset ADC DC Bus voltage High
($2A2E) - Gain ADC DC Bus voltage Low
($2A2F) - Offset ADC DC Bus voltage Low
($2A34) - Measured voltage between phase a and phase c
($2A40) - Context variable one for DTC reset
($2A41) - Context variable one for DTC reset
($2A42) - Context variable one for DTC reset
($2A43) - Context variable one for DTC reset
($2A44) - Context variable one for DTC reset
($EF12) - Ext. Memory - New ver. Area - STATUS
($EF14) - Ext. Memory - New ver. Area - Bank Number
($2A0E) - Overvoltage protection between phase A and phase C (monophase)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: DataRead.($295E) - Downgraded mode due to FPGA
Request.Comment: Read ($295E) - Downgraded mode due to FPGA

Request.Name: DataRead.($2997) - Failure confirmed AC overvoltage high 1
Request.Comment: Read ($2997) - Failure confirmed AC overvoltage high 1

Request.Name: DataRead.($2998) - Failure confirmed AC overvoltage high 2
Request.Comment: Read ($2998) - Failure confirmed AC overvoltage high 2

Request.Name: DataRead.($29A4) - Relay control signal on phase A

DataItem.Name: ($29A4) - Relay control signal on phase A

Request.Name: DataRead.($29A5) - Relay control signal on phase B

DataItem.Name: ($29A5) - Relay control signal on phase B

Request.Name: DataRead.($29A6) - Relay control signal on phase N

DataItem.Name: ($29A6) - Relay control signal on phase N

Request.Name: DataRead.($29AD) - Current mains mono or three-phase
DataRead.($29E3) - DC out voltage_h local failure
DataRead.($29E4) - DC out voltage low local failure

DataItem.Name: ($29E4) - DC out voltage low local failure

Request.Name: DataRead.($29F3) - Default reset request by DID
DataRead.($29F4) - phase C relay control signal
DataRead.($29F6) - DCDC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29F9) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29FA) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29FB) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29FC) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29FD) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($29FE) - PFC PWM request by DID
DataRead.($2A00) - Raw measured phase b current
DataRead.($2A01) - Raw measured phase c current
DataRead.($2A02) - Raw measured voltage between phase a and phase c (Va-Vc)

DataItem.Name: ($2A02) - Raw measured voltage between phase a and phase c (Va-Vc)

Request.Name: DataRead.($2A03) - Raw measured phase a current 1
DataRead.($2A04) - Raw measured phase b current 1
DataRead.($2A05) - Raw measured phase c current 1
DataRead.($2A09) - Raw measured DC volltage High
DataRead.($2A0A) - Raw measured DC voltage Low
DataRead.($29FF) - Raw measured phase a current

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.TravelledDistanceTestFailed
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip
